name: Lenovo ThinkVision P27Q-40 27" IPS Monitor - 2560x1440 - 24Hz-120Hz Variable Refresh Rate - 98% DCI-P3 - Daisy Chaining Capability - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort In&Out - USB 3.2 Gen1 Upstream - 3x USB-A 5Gbps - 15W PD USB-C (Data only) (64A7GAR6UZ)
description: 27-inch professional monitor with 2560x1440 resolution, 98% DCI-P3 color accuracy, daisy chaining capability, and flexible USB-C connectivity.
